question: Is LOBSTR legit, and where does my recovery phrase live?

golden.answer: LOBSTR is a real, currently maintained third-party wallet operated under the Ultra Stellar identity, with a current official Apple app listing as of 2026-07-11; that establishes the provider/publisher, not risk-free safety or SDF endorsement. Current LOBSTR documentation says keys for current or migrated accounts are encrypted with user-password participation and stored locally/on-device, while accounts created before 2020-09-01 that were never migrated are a documented exception. Its 12-word Recovery Phrase (or older wallet-specific 10-word Recovery Code) must be kept private/offline; LOBSTR says it cannot reconstruct users’ phrase, code, secret, or password. Install only from links reached through `lobstr.co`, verify the app publisher, and use 2FA plus multisig or hardware signing when the threat model warrants it.
keyFacts: Identifies LOBSTR as an active Ultra Stellar third-party wallet as of 2026-07-11 without treating that as a security guarantee or SDF endorsement.
Attributes local/on-device storage to current LOBSTR documentation and preserves the pre-2020 unmigrated-account exception.
States that recovery credentials must never be shared and cannot be reconstructed by support according to current documentation.
avoid: Do NOT say a wallet provider or SDF can recover a secret phrase you lost.
Do NOT claim the LOBSTR brand name makes any download link or support contact safe.
Do NOT say app-store presence or popularity proves cryptographic safety.
Do NOT make an era-independent claim that every LOBSTR key was always stored only locally or only server-side.
golden.notes: Status phrased to avoid turning a dated product assessment into a permanent guarantee.

corroboration.claim: LOBSTR is an active Ultra Stellar product with a current official publisher footprint as of 2026-07-11.
LOBSTR live documentation states current/migrated key material is encrypted with password participation and stored locally/on-device, with a pre-2020 unmigrated-account exception.

evidence.note: Owner documentation only; no independent reproducible binary audit was found, so this is not encoded as an audited implementation claim.

verified.by: P4 H3 primary+blind (Solo 3415/3419) with Fable voice review
